title: New Item/sub items 'Customer' integrated to Xero

posts.author: Sarah-Venturi (Sarah Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We have started to use xero for our accounting package and we track customers via monday.com
The customer can have more than one account so we use sub items for the separate accounts. Its there a way to integrate with xero so the subitems are created in xero?
Thanks
